key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: FY2025 operating cash flow $785.8M less capital spending $177.7M ÷ 76.568M diluted shares per ALGN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260227_rpt20251231_acc0001097149_26_000014.htm
Clear Aligner retention + international mix; Systems growth mid-single-digit

open_questions: Confirm Q1 FY2026 teen-case volume recovery is sustainable through FY2026.
Share-based compensation **$154M** FY2025: adjust owner cash if treating SBC as real cost.
Litigation reserves not separately disclosed; competition reserve is judgment band only.
No approved third-party sources; re-scan when Substacks or fund letters added.
thesis: Align Technology manufactures and sells Invisalign clear aligners and the iTero intraoral scanner ecosystem to orthodontists and general dentists worldwide. **[Fact]** FY2025 net revenue was **$3.86 billion**; Clear Aligner net revenues were **$3.25 billion** (~84% of consolidated), and Systems and Services were **$790 million** (~20%). **[Fact]** FY2025 operating cash flow was **$786 million** minus capital spending of **$178 million**, on **76.6 million** diluted shares. **[Fact]** The balance sheet held **$1.04 billion** cash with **no long-term debt** and an undrawn **$300 million** revolving credit facility. **[Inference]** Align earns per-case fees from doctor-directed orthodontic treatment plus scanner lease, software, and services revenue that lock doctors into the digital workflow.
why_market_wrong: The stock trades near component-sum fair value while the market may overweight **post-pandemic volume normalization** and underweight **scanner ecosystem retention**. **[Fact]** Q1 FY2026 revenue grew **6.2%** year over year to **$1.04 billion** with diluted EPS **$1.57** versus **$1.27** prior year; operating cash flow improved to **$151 million** from **$53 million**. **[Inference]** Conversely, the market may underprice **DTC competition and average selling price pressure** on adult cases. **[Fact]** FY2025 research and development was **$347 million** and share-based compensation **$154 million**, reflecting continued product investment amid litigation (antitrust, Straumann, Angelalign). **[Inference]** No dated HK predictive attribute exists; the edge is **franchise quality at fair price**, not a catalyst with a known payoff date.
